description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:20.10 image with a docker:20.10-dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER, DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR and IMAGE_NAME variables, and runs a before_script to log in to the GitLab registry with docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p ${CI_BUILD_TOKEN} ${CI_REGISTRY}. Define two stages: build-base and build-others. In the build-base stage add a devel job (and a patched job with identical steps) that runs: docker build --tag ${IMAGE_NAME} --build-arg R_VERSION=${CI_BUILD_NAME} .; docker run ${IMAGE_NAME} R --version; docker push ${IMAGE_NAME}. Also in build-base add an oldrel job (and a release job with identical steps) that runs: apk add jq curl; R_VERSION=$(curl -s "https://rversions.r-pkg.org/r-${CI_BUILD_NAME}" | jq -r '.[].version'); docker pull ${IMAGE_NAME} || true; docker build --cache-from ${IMAGE_NAME} --tag ${IMAGE_NAME} --build-arg R_VERSION=${R_VERSION} .; docker run ${IMAGE_NAME} R --version; docker tag ${IMAGE_NAME} ${IMAGE_NAME}:${R_VERSION}; docker tag ${IMAGE_NAME} ${IMAGE_NAME}:${R_VERSION:0:1}; docker push ${IMAGE_NAME}; docker push ${IMAGE_NAME}:${R_VERSION}; docker push ${IMAGE_NAME}:${R_VERSION:0:1}. In the build-others stage add a tidyverse job that runs: docker build --tag ${IMAGE_NAME} --build-arg APK_PKG="${APK_PKG}" --build-arg R_CRAN_PKG="${R_CRAN_PKG}" --build-arg R_GITHUB_PKG="${R_GITHUB_PKG}" --file Dockerfile-rpkg .; docker run ${IMAGE_NAME} Rscript -e "packageVersion('${CI_BUILD_NAME}')"; docker push ${IMAGE_NAME}. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined, so all jobs run on every pipeline.
